capabilities.name: Endpoint Detection & Response (EDR)
capabilities.description: Deployment, configuration, and ongoing monitoring of EDR tooling across all managed endpoints. Includes alert triage and response.

capabilities.name: Anti-Malware / Antivirus
capabilities.description: Deployment and maintenance of anti-malware solutions, signature updates, and scan scheduling on endpoints and servers.

capabilities.name: Mobile Device Management (MDM)
capabilities.description: Enrollment, policy enforcement, and remote wipe capability for mobile devices that access organizational systems or CUI.

capabilities.name: Device Encryption
capabilities.description: Full-disk encryption enforcement on laptops, desktops, and removable media using FIPS-validated cryptographic modules.

capabilities.name: Identity & Access Management (IAM)
capabilities.description: Provisioning, deprovisioning, and ongoing review of user accounts, roles, and access rights across all systems.

capabilities.name: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
capabilities.description: Enforcement of MFA for all privileged and non-privileged accounts accessing organizational systems, especially remote access.

capabilities.name: Privileged Access Management (PAM)
capabilities.description: Management of privileged accounts including separation of duties, just-in-time access, and privileged session monitoring.

capabilities.name: Directory Services (AD / Entra ID)
capabilities.description: Administration of on-premises or cloud directory services including group policy, organizational units, and federation.

capabilities.name: Vulnerability Scanning
capabilities.description: Periodic authenticated vulnerability scanning of all in-scope systems with remediation tracking and reporting.

capabilities.name: Penetration Testing
capabilities.description: Periodic adversarial testing of systems and networks to identify exploitable vulnerabilities before assessors or attackers do.

capabilities.name: Patch Management
capabilities.description: Timely identification, testing, and deployment of security patches across all managed systems within defined SLAs.

capabilities.name: Firewall Management
capabilities.description: Configuration, rule review, and ongoing management of perimeter and internal firewalls enforcing least-privilege traffic policy.

capabilities.name: Network Segmentation
capabilities.description: Design and enforcement of network boundaries isolating CUI systems from general IT and external networks.

capabilities.name: VPN / Remote Access
capabilities.description: Provisioning and management of secure remote access solutions including split tunneling policy and session controls.

capabilities.name: Wireless Security
capabilities.description: Configuration and monitoring of wireless networks including WPA3 enforcement, rogue AP detection, and guest network isolation.

capabilities.name: DNS / DHCP Management
capabilities.description: Management of internal DNS and DHCP services including DNS filtering, DNSSEC, and rogue device detection.

capabilities.name: Cloud Infrastructure Security (IaaS / PaaS)
capabilities.description: Security configuration of cloud-hosted infrastructure including identity federation, network security groups, and CSP CRM alignment.

capabilities.name: SaaS Security & Configuration
capabilities.description: Security hardening of SaaS platforms (M365, Salesforce, etc.) including conditional access, DLP policies, and admin role review.

capabilities.name: Cloud Access Security Broker (CASB)
capabilities.description: Visibility and control over cloud application usage, shadow IT detection, and data exfiltration prevention via CASB tooling.

capabilities.name: Cloud Backup & Recovery
capabilities.description: Management of cloud-resident backup jobs, retention policies, and restoration testing for CUI-bearing systems.

capabilities.name: Data Classification & CUI Handling
capabilities.description: Definition and enforcement of data classification standards, CUI identification procedures, and handling/marking requirements per 32 CFR 2002.

capabilities.name: Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
capabilities.description: Deployment and tuning of DLP controls to detect and prevent unauthorized exfiltration of CUI via email, USB, or cloud upload.

capabilities.name: Encryption at Rest
capabilities.description: Enforcement of FIPS 140-2/-3 validated encryption for CUI stored on servers, databases, workstations, and cloud storage.

capabilities.name: Encryption in Transit
capabilities.description: Enforcement of TLS 1.2+ with FIPS-validated cipher suites for all CUI transmitted across networks, including internal segments.

capabilities.name: Media Sanitization & Disposal
capabilities.description: Controlled sanitization (NIST SP 800-88) and disposal of storage media containing CUI, including certificates of destruction.

capabilities.name: SIEM / Security Monitoring
capabilities.description: Aggregation, correlation, and alerting on security events from all in-scope systems with defined response SLAs.

capabilities.name: Log Management & Retention
capabilities.description: Collection, centralization, integrity protection, and retention of audit logs for all CUI-handling systems for the required period.

capabilities.name: Security Operations
capabilities.description: Day-to-day security operations including alert triage, threat hunting, indicator management, and escalation to incident response.

capabilities.name: Incident Response Planning
capabilities.description: Development, maintenance, and testing of the incident response plan including roles, escalation paths, and required notification timelines.

capabilities.name: Incident Handling & Containment
capabilities.description: Execution of incident response procedures including detection, containment, eradication, recovery, and post-incident review.

capabilities.name: Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery
capabilities.description: Development and testing of BC/DR plans ensuring recovery of CUI-processing systems within defined RTO/RPO targets.

capabilities.name: Information Security Policy
capabilities.description: Development, review, and communication of organizational information security policies and procedures aligned to CMMC requirements.

capabilities.name: Risk Assessment
capabilities.description: Periodic assessment of organizational risk to operations, assets, and CUI, with documented risk acceptance or remediation decisions.

capabilities.name: Security Awareness Training
capabilities.description: Delivery of role-based security awareness training including CUI handling, phishing awareness, and insider threat recognition.

capabilities.name: CMMC Assessment Preparation
capabilities.description: Coordination of CMMC Level 2 assessment activities including evidence collection, SSP maintenance, and assessor liaison.

capabilities.name: Third-Party / Supply Chain Risk
capabilities.description: Vetting of vendors and subcontractors who handle CUI, including flow-down requirements and periodic supplier risk reviews.

capabilities.name: Configuration & Change Management
capabilities.description: Establishment and enforcement of configuration baselines for all CUI-handling systems, with formal change control for modifications.

capabilities.name: Physical Access Control
capabilities.description: Management of physical access controls to facilities and areas where CUI is processed or stored, including badge systems and visitor logs.

capabilities.name: Facility Security
capabilities.description: Oversight of facility security measures including perimeter controls, cameras, alarms, and environmental protections for CUI areas.

capabilities.name: Equipment Handling & Disposal
capabilities.description: Controlled handling, maintenance, and disposal of IT equipment that has processed or stored CUI, with documented chain of custody.
